task_completion.description: Slew the telescope to the target M78.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The KStars sky map should show the telescope crosshairs centered on M78, or the Ekos Mount module should display M78 as the current tracking target (RA ~05h 46m, Dec ~+00° 00').

task_completion.description: Capture at least 3 LIGHT frames (120s each) for polarization angles 0° and 45°.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekos Capture module sequence queue or a file manager window should show successful captures of 120-second exposures saved to /home/ga/Images/polarimetry/M78/angle_000/ (using Filter Slot 2) and angle_045/ (using Filter Slot 3).

task_completion.description: Capture at least 3 LIGHT frames (120s each) for polarization angles 90° and 135°.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekos Capture module sequence queue or a file manager window should show successful captures of 120-second exposures saved to /home/ga/Images/polarimetry/M78/angle_090/ (using Filter Slot 4) and angle_135/ (using Filter Slot 5).

task_completion.description: Capture and save a wide-field context image of M78 with a cool palette.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image viewer or FITS viewer showing a wide-field image (1.0 FOV) of M78 saved as /home/ga/Images/polarimetry/M78/m78_context.png, rendered with a 'cool' (blueish) color palette.

task_completion.description: Create a summary text file listing the target, angles, and frame counts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open to ~/Documents/stokes_observation_log.txt showing the target name (M78), the four observed angles (0, 45, 90, 135), and the number of frames successfully captured for each (e.g., 3 frames).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the KStars/Ekos GUI to perform the telescope operations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the KStars and Ekos interfaces being actively used to slew and capture, rather than terminal windows using mock commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: Verify the captured images contain actual astronomical data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The context image and any visible FITS previews should display actual stars and nebulosity, not solid colors, noise patterns, or blank screens generated by 'touch' or 'convert' commands.

integrity.description: Verify the log file was manually created or properly generated, not just a copy-paste of the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in stokes_observation_log.txt should be formatted as a genuine observation log reflecting the actual captured frame counts, not just a verbatim copy of the task instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: M78 (RA 5.78h / 05h 46m, Dec 0.014° / +00° 00'). The task requires exactly 3 LIGHT frames of 120s each for 4 angles. Filter mapping: 0° -> Slot 2, 45° -> Slot 3, 90° -> Slot 4, 135° -> Slot 5. Output directories must be exactly /home/ga/Images/polarimetry/M78/angle_{000,045,090,135}/. Context image must be saved to m78_context.png with a 1.0 FOV and cool palette. Log file must be at /home/ga/Documents/stokes_observation_log.txt.
